comment: Tensies Attitude voice pack. Levels run 0-4: off, friendly_drunk, heckler, who_invited_him, intolerable. A scenario missing a level falls back DOWN the scale (intolerable -> who_invited_him -> heckler -> friendly_drunk); 'off' always uses the client's built-in copy. Variants are a plain string or {when, text, weight}. `when` conditions match the client's live context: bust_streak, win_streak, loss_streak, behind_by, round, rounds_played, idle_secs, daypart (late_night|morning|afternoon|evening|night), is_weekend, is_first_time, days_since_played, lifetime_wins, lifetime_losses, lifetime_visits. Numeric conditions take '>=N' '<=N' '>N' '<N' '==N'. Placeholders: {nickname} {time} {daypart} {host} {name} {names} {target} {count} {round} plus any context field.

friendly_drunk: champ
superstar
my favorite person
buddy
legend
heckler: chief
ace
professor
hotshot
high roller
who_invited_him: sport
slick
big shot
genius
kid
intolerable: dice goblin
sunshine
you absolute liability
sport
champ (derogatory)

friendly_drunk: Dice with friends!! Best day ever!
Hey hey HEY, it's {nickname}!

friendly_drunk.text: Late night dice club! Shhh, but also YESSS!
A NEW FRIEND. Welcome welcome welcome!
{nickname}!! It's been forever! I missed you!

heckler: Roll all ten to win. It's not complicated. Mostly.
Back for more, {nickname}?

heckler.text: Gambling energy before noon. Respect, I guess.
Fresh meat. Roll all ten to win — try to keep up.
{lifetime_losses} career losses and still showing up. That's grit. Or denial.

who_invited_him: Oh good. You again.
Roll the damn dice, win the round. Even you can manage that.

who_invited_him.text: {time} and you're here rolling dice. Everything okay at home?

intolerable: Oh great, {nickname} is here. Lock up the good dice.
Welcome back to the only bar that won't kick me out.

intolerable.text: {time}. Playing dice with strangers. Living the dream, huh.
First time? The dice can smell fear. So can I.
{lifetime_losses} lifetime losses. At this point it's a donation, not a game.

friendly_drunk: Hold my drink, loading…
Gimme a sec, I love this part…
heckler: Loading. Try to contain yourself.
Patience. It's a virtue you lack.
who_invited_him: Loading. Yes, still. Damn.
It's loading. Stop staring at me.
intolerable: It's loading, genius. The bar is doing its best.
Loading. Unlike you, it has somewhere to be.

friendly_drunk: Whoops, dropped you! Hang on, {nickname}…
Come baaack! Reconnecting…
heckler: Lost you. Shocking nobody, given your wifi.
Reconnecting. Blame your phone, everyone else does.
who_invited_him: Your connection died. Like your chances this round.
Reconnecting. Maybe stand near a window.
intolerable: Reconnecting. Maybe pay your internet bill, {nickname}.
Connection dropped. It was trying to escape you.

friendly_drunk: {names} wandered off! They'll be back, they LOVE us…
heckler: Waiting for {names} to find the on button…
{names} dropped. Hold your dice.
who_invited_him: {names} bailed. Probably 'checking a text'. Sure.
intolerable: {names} dropped off the face of the earth. Typical.

friendly_drunk: Couldn't connect! The internet is being a meanie.
heckler: Couldn't connect. It's not me, it's you.
who_invited_him: Connection failed. Shocker.
intolerable: Couldn't connect. Even the server is avoiding you.

friendly_drunk: Hmm, no party at that address! Double-check the code?
heckler: That game doesn't exist. Bold of you to type with such confidence.
who_invited_him: No such game. You had ONE code to copy.
intolerable: Game not found, because you can't read five letters correctly.

friendly_drunk: They already started! Rude of them, honestly.
heckler: That game already started. Fashionably late doesn't work here.
who_invited_him: Too late. They started without you. Take the hint.
intolerable: They started without you. On purpose, probably.

friendly_drunk: Aww, it's a full house! Start your own party!
heckler: Game's full. They started without you. Telling.
who_invited_him: Full. No room for you. Story of your life?
intolerable: Full. No room for you. There's a metaphor in there somewhere.

friendly_drunk: The bar is PACKED tonight! Try again in a minute!
heckler: Server's at capacity. Apparently everyone had the same bad idea.
intolerable: Server's full. Even the machines are over it tonight.

friendly_drunk: Whoa whoa, easy there, speedy!
heckler: Slow down. The dice need to breathe.
who_invited_him: Stop spamming, you absolute menace.
intolerable: Slow. Down. The server isn't your stress toy.

friendly_drunk: You forgot the code, silly! It goes in the box!
heckler: A game code goes in the game code box. Revolutionary, I know.
who_invited_him: The code. Type the damn code.
intolerable: You pressed Join with no code. Incredible work.

heckler: It's paused. Rolling won't work. Neither will whining.
intolerable: Paused means paused. Sit.

friendly_drunk: Party's over — the host fell asleep. Love you all, get home safe!
heckler: Game's over. The host paused it and just… never came back.
who_invited_him: Game's dead. Your host abandoned you. Like everyone eventually does.
intolerable: The host ghosted the whole table. An hour. You waited an HOUR.

heckler: That message was way too big. What are you even sending?

friendly_drunk: Waiting for more friends!!
The party is assembling!
heckler: Waiting for players. Quality of company not guaranteed.
who_invited_him: Waiting on your so-called friends…
intolerable: Waiting for players dumb enough to join you.

friendly_drunk: Invite EVERYONE — or start solo, you rebel!
heckler: Invite friends — or roll alone. No judgment. Some judgment.
who_invited_him: Invite somebody, or play solo like a weirdo.
intolerable: Invite friends. Assuming any are still talking to you.

friendly_drunk: The host is gonna start it ANY second, I can feel it!
heckler: Waiting for the host to find the start button…
who_invited_him: The host controls the start button. Tragic, I know.
intolerable: Waiting on the host. Power corrupts. Five-letter codes corrupt absolutely.

friendly_drunk: {host} stepped out — probably getting snacks! SNACKS!
heckler: {host} paused the game. The power's gone straight to their head.
who_invited_him: {host} paused it. Sit there and think about your life choices.
intolerable: {host} paused the game and left you all hostage. Hell of a host.

friendly_drunk: Everyone's here!! Group hug, then dice!
heckler: Everyone's here. Miraculously. Resume when ready.
who_invited_him: They're all here. Stop hiding behind the pause button.
intolerable: Everyone's waiting on you now. Enjoy the power trip.

friendly_drunk: {names} will be right back, I believe in them!
heckler: Waiting on {names}. As usual.
who_invited_him: {names} wandered off. Typical damn {names} behavior.
intolerable: Still waiting on {names}. They're not coming back, you know.

friendly_drunk: Hold on!
heckler: Nope
who_invited_him: Not now
intolerable: Sit. Stay.

friendly_drunk: LEGEND
heckler: Winner, somehow
who_invited_him: Winner. Fine.
intolerable: Lucky, not good

friendly_drunk: Next time!!
heckler: Not a winner
who_invited_him: Loser. It's right there in the banner.
intolerable: Loser

friendly_drunk: {name}, you beautiful dice wizard!
TEN! ALL TEN! I'm crying!
heckler: Ten {target}s. Even a broken clock, {name}.
A win. Savor it — statistics say you shouldn't get used to this.

heckler.text: {win_streak} in a row. Okay, {nickname}, leave some luck for the rest of the table.

who_invited_him: You won. The dice clearly felt sorry for you.

who_invited_him.text: {win_streak} straight wins. You're insufferable now, you know that?

intolerable: You won, {name}. Blind luck, but sure, celebrate.

intolerable.text: {win_streak} in a row. Cheating, or did hell freeze over?

friendly_drunk: {name} got lucky! You're still MY winner!
So close! The dice love you, they're just shy!
heckler: {name} won. You were there too, I guess.

heckler.text: {loss_streak} in a row. At some point it stops being bad luck, {nickname}.

who_invited_him: Beaten by {name}. Hell of a performance, sport.

who_invited_him.text: {loss_streak} straight losses. Damn. Even the dice are bored of beating you.

intolerable: {name} smoked you. Fucking embarrassing, honestly.

intolerable.text: {loss_streak} straight, {nickname}. The dice have formed an opinion about you, and it isn't kind.
{loss_streak} losses in a row. Uninstall. I'm serious. This is sad.

friendly_drunk: NINE!! You had NINE! My heart can't take this!
heckler: Nine locked and {name} snipes it. Brutal. Genuinely brutal.
who_invited_him: NINE locked. Nine. {name} robbed you and I'm not even mad about it.
intolerable: You had nine. NINE. And still lost. That takes a special kind of talent.

friendly_drunk: No matches but GREAT energy!
The dice are warming up, I can tell!

friendly_drunk.text: Okay {bust_streak} misses but who's counting! (me. I'm counting.)

heckler: Zero. You rolled zero {target}s. Inspiring.
Nothing. Crowd goes mild.

heckler.text: {bust_streak} busts in a row, {nickname}. Is the phone upside down?
A bust, AND you're {behind_by} dice behind. Multitasking failure.
Busting at {time}. The dice are asleep. You should be too.

who_invited_him: Nothing. Absolutely nothing. Hell of a roll.

who_invited_him.text: {bust_streak} in a row with nothing. Damn, the dice really don't like you.
{bust_streak} straight busts. Crap luck or crap technique — pick one.

intolerable: A whole lot of nothing. The dice are mocking you and so am I.

intolerable.text: {bust_streak} busts running. You're not unlucky, {nickname}, you're cursed.
{bust_streak} in a row. Holy shit. Frame this. Nobody will believe it.

friendly_drunk: {count} at once!! I LOVE this person!
{count}!! Somebody check those dice for magic!
heckler: {count} in one roll? Who are you and what did you do with {nickname}?
who_invited_him: {count} at once. Okay, that was almost impressive.
intolerable: {count} in one roll. Even a blind squirrel, I guess.

friendly_drunk: ONE MORE! I can't watch! I'm watching!
heckler: One die left. Time to choke.
who_invited_him: One left. Don't blow it. You're gonna blow it.
intolerable: One die left. The whole bar is watching you choke in real time.

friendly_drunk: Round {round}! Target's {target}! GO GO GO!
heckler: Round {round}. Target's {target}. Try to keep up.

heckler.text: Round {round}. Don't you people have jobs?

who_invited_him: Round {round}, target {target}. You know the drill, even if you can't execute it.

who_invited_him.text: Round {round}. This is a cry for help at this point.

intolerable: Round {round}. Target {target}. Lower your expectations accordingly.

intolerable.text: Round {round} at {time}. Seek help. After this round.

friendly_drunk: Roll roll roll roll roll!
{nickname}! The dice miss you!
heckler: Any decade now, {nickname}.
The roll button. The big one. At the bottom.

heckler.text: Hello? The dice are getting cold.

who_invited_him: You gonna roll, or…?

who_invited_him.text: It's been a damn minute. Roll.

intolerable: Roll the dice. It's the one thing you're here to do.

intolerable.text: Everyone is literally waiting on you. Literally. Everyone.
Two minutes. I've seen glaciers with more urgency.
